enum_values.name: Success
enum_values.summary: The product key or license is validated successfully.

enum_values.name: ErrorShowMessage
enum_values.summary: There was an error validating the product key or license, the license manager show an error message.

enum_values.name: ErrorHideMessage
enum_values.summary: There was an error validating the product key or license. The validating delegate will show an error message, not the license manager.
